label: Implement miniGPT from Scratch
description: Build a character-level GPT implementation from scratch in PyTorch, train on a text corpus, and analyze what the model learns.
protocol: Follow Karpathy's nanoGPT approach: implement multi-head attention, positional embedding, and training loop. Train on Shakespeare. Measure loss and generate samples.

label: LoRA Fine-tuning on Custom Dataset
description: Fine-tune a 7B LLM using LoRA on a custom instruction-following dataset and evaluate against a baseline.
protocol: Prepare a 1000-sample instruction dataset. Fine-tune using LoRA rank=8. Evaluate on held-out prompts. Compare outputs to base model.

label: Hohmann Transfer Simulation in GMAT
description: Simulate a Hohmann transfer from LEO to GEO in GMAT. Compute delta-v requirements and validate against analytical solution.
protocol: Set up a LEO initial orbit in GMAT (400km circular). Define target GEO orbit (35786km circular). Compute two-impulse Hohmann transfer. Compare to analytical Tsiolkovsky calculation.
